patterns.state_persistence: Current pattern: json.dump/load per file (CD_FILE, TRADE_STATE, WATCH_CD_FILE, VP_FILE)
patterns.error_handling: try/except with silent fallback to default/empty state
patterns.per_symbol_state: Each symbol has separate state files (_trade, _cd, _watch, _vp, _tg, _skip)
patterns.cooldown_pattern: Store {'t': time.time()} and check time.time() - t < COOLDOWN_SECONDS

existing_implementations.description: State management is ALREADY implemented but fragmented across multiple files

risk_assessment.reasoning: Modifying live trading scanner state management - data loss could result in duplicate alerts or missed TP/SL updates
risk_assessment.mitigation: Atomic writes, schema validation, graceful degradation on corruption
